title: Kafka Connect Component Discovery
activity_flow: LOOP: for each interfaceName in COMPONENT_INTERFACES.values()
CALL: extractJarPath(urlString) → strip 'jar:' prefix, extract path before '!'
DECISION: jarName already in indices map?
TRY: open URL stream → IndexReader.read() → Index
YES → log 'Using pre-built index', return prebuiltIndex
LOOP: for each JarEntry ending with '.class'
ON ERROR → log debug, skip entry, count=0
ON EXCEPTION → log warn, return Optional.empty()
CATCH IOException → log warn, continue next interface
YES → log warn 'No Kafka Connect JARs found', RETURN Map.of()
LOOP: for each (ComponentType, interfaceName) in COMPONENT_INTERFACES.entrySet()
LOOP: for each Index in jarIndices.values()
ON ClassNotFoundException → log warn, wrap in Optional.empty()
COLLECT: unmodifiable list of loaded Class<?> objects
decision_points: jarIndices.isEmpty() → return empty map or proceed to component discovery
jarName already indexed? → skip or index new JAR
Pre-built jandex.idx present? → use prebuilt index or scan .class files
Class.forName() succeeds? → include class or log warn and skip
error_handling: IOException from getResources() → log warn, continue to next interface
Exception in createIndexFromJarClasses() → log warn, return Optional.empty()
ClassNotFoundException in Class.forName() → log warn, wrap in Optional.empty()
Exception in indexer.index(classStream) → log debug, skip entry (count 0)
filters_applied: Only JAR URLs (starts with 'jar:file:') — excludes exploded classpath entries
Only org.apache.kafka.* classes — excludes third-party or internal implementations
Only concrete classes (!Modifier.isAbstract) — excludes abstract base classes
key_relationships: KafkaConnectDiscoveryService uses Jandex (IndexReader, Indexer, Index, DotName)
KafkaConnectDiscoveryService uses ClassLoader to locate META-INF/services resources
KafkaConnectDiscoveryService uses java.util.jar.JarFile to scan .class entries
Discovery keyed by ComponentType enum (TRANSFORMATION, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, PREDICATE)
Pre-built index (META-INF/jandex.idx) takes priority over runtime scan
test_scenarios: shouldIncludeAllComponentTypes: result contains all 4 ComponentType keys
shouldDiscoverTransformationsWhenKafkaConnectAvailable: transformations list not null; if non-empty all start with org.apache.kafka
shouldOnlyDiscoverConcreteClasses: no abstract classes in any component list
important_notes: Discovery is classpath-driven via META-INF/services SPI. Deduplication of JARs by filename. Jandex pre-built index (jandex.idx) is preferred over runtime scanning for performance. TODO in code notes KC 4.3 / KIP-1273 will introduce ConnectPlugin interface to unify discovery.
